item.title: Republican Gaslighting
item.description:
The Vice President of the United States lies to its citizens.
That the majority of their party is filled with white supremacists.
Folks, let there be no mistake. These folks want to be the modern day Nazis.

item.dc:creator: Thantos06

item.title: Pentagon journalists exit en masse over new reporting restrictions
item.description:
Dozens of reporters have turned in their access badges and exited the Pentagon rather than agree to government-imposed restrictions on their work. Several global media organisations have refused to sign a pledge to refrain from reporting information not authorised for release by the Pentagon.
TRUMP said "The press is very dishonest."
News outlets were unanimous in rejecting the rules imposed by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. The order would leave journalists vulnerable to expulsion if they sought to report on information – classified or otherwise – that had not been approved by Mr Hegseth for release.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: The bloom distracts from the thorns.
item.description:
My Yor Forger cosplay from Spy x Family. From cozy sweater to bloodstained grace. Casual Yor was one of my favorite sets, but the Thorn Princess demanded her turn. Finally, she joins my cosplay collection, just in time for Season 3. (Konelli - https://www.instagram.com/konelli.cosplay/)
Reference
item.dc:creator: Konelli

item.title: Wealthy woman goes to Spirit Halloween
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: It's my 4th Cakeday & This is My 1st Dump.
item.description:
Been lurking since 2012, joined 2021, this is my first post so go easy on me?
Created an account much later
Come here mainly for dumps
Greatly enjoy memes
Considering I'm from the Angry Kid/Teen Girl Squad era
Okay, I was in Uni then but still...
I'm from Cape Breton Island, Nova Scotia, originally
Now I live in Mississauga with my partner Malcolm
I'm a performer (opera/operetta/musical theatre) - I do a lot of G&S
I have a decent admin job short hours good pay and I'm sorry for bragging.
I'm fairly clumsy and have bad luck
But in like a Mr. Bean way - not tragic backstory way
"YOU GOTTA KNOW WHAT A CRUMPET IS TO UNDERSTAND CRICKET" is STILL one of the best lines of dialogue captured on film.
My partner and I love to travel, and eat good food, and wine.
Raised by strong women, I love this thread
And chips.
I also host/emcee various events. Recently ended a 2.5 year stint hosting Opera Pubs which are exactly what you think
And next month I'll be hosting an opera/professional wrestling gala "Let's get ready to REEECIIIIIIIIIIT!"
I'm not a doctor but I play one in 200 year old operas.
I love coming to Imgur (recent Business Daddy drama included) but y'all really are a community
And I love non-toxic positivity from strangers
And I SUPER LOVE when people get excited about their "things" (hobbies, work, kids, pets, etc...)
My favourite cocktail is a French75
My favourite food is Pizza (see: NT Obsession)
And I hope you all stay fresh, cheesebags. Take care of each other.
item.dc:creator: giggyhertz

item.title: Mitch McConnell Slipped And Fell After A Reporter Asked: "Do you support ICE taking working people off the streets and kidnapping them?"
item.description:
McConnell fell in the Russell Basement, was helped up and appeared to be okay. He appeared to say "later", waving to the camera.
Lucifer tweeted back.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Random stolen memes: 221
item.description: Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, but this one isn’t. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

Journalists give up press passes rather than agreeing to approval from Hegseth before reporting

item.title: The bravest little kitten.
item.description: I'll hold off the kaiju while you get away!
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: Getting new foster kittens!
item.description: So Thelma and Louise went back to the humane society to be fixed and put up for adoption yesterday, and Mario and Luigi have been let out of the kitten room, so Jess just texted to ask if I can handle four more kittens. She said they’re about six weeks old and their mama was run over by a car. The guy taking care of them has been feeding them cows milk so they have really bad diarrhea. I just deep cleaned the kitten room so I guess I can handle some leaky butts haha. I’m going to pick them up in a couple of hours, wish me luck!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: When they ask who the leader of Antifa was, may I suggest this dashing gentleman.
item.dc:creator: TheRealSauceBoss

item.title: Playing Some More MTG
item.description:
Playing MTG again! Also found the perfect land card for myself. I got so many questions about what Commanders I play after you all heard I like Commander (it's what most folks are playing lately in my hive at least). My Favs: The First Sliver, The 10th Doctor/Rose Tyler, Ellivere, and Teval. What about you all?"
Yesssss
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
